generalTips: Position your bed diagonally from the door, not directly in line with it.
Use soft, rounded furniture to promote gentle energy flow.
Keep the space under your bed clear for chi to circulate.
Balance yin and yang with both soft and firm textures.

baguaAreas.Love: Place pairs of objects (two candles, two crystals) in the southwest corner.
baguaAreas.Health: Keep electronics away from the bed area. Use earth tones.
baguaAreas.Career: Face your bed toward the door (but not in line with it) for opportunity.

whatToAvoid: Avoid mirrors facing the bed — they reflect energy and disrupt sleep.
Avoid clutter under the bed.
Avoid electronics near the headboard.
Avoid sharp corners pointing at the bed.

generalTips: Arrange seating in a circle or facing each other to encourage conversation.
The main seating should face the entrance to see opportunities arriving.
Use layered lighting — overhead, task, and accent — for balanced energy.
Incorporate all five Feng Shui elements: Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water.

baguaAreas.Wealth: Place a living plant or water feature in the southeast corner.
baguaAreas.Fame: Use red accents or a fireplace in the south area.
baguaAreas.Family: Place family photos or living plants in the east area.

whatToAvoid: Avoid blocking pathways with furniture.
Avoid sharp-edged furniture pointing at seating areas.
Avoid dark, heavy curtains that block natural light.

generalTips: Position your desk in the 'command position' — facing the door diagonally.
Keep your desk surface clear and organized.
Use a solid wall behind you for support energy.
Incorporate metal elements for clarity and precision.

baguaAreas.Career: Place your desk in the north area of the room.
baguaAreas.Knowledge: Keep reference books and learning materials in the northeast.
baguaAreas.Wealth: Place a plant or wealth symbol in the southeast corner of your desk.

whatToAvoid: Avoid sitting with your back to the door.
Avoid cluttered desk surfaces.
Avoid overhead beams directly above your seating.

generalTips: Keep the stove clean and in good working order — it represents wealth.
Use all five colors on your counters (fruit, herbs) for balanced chi.
Hang wooden spoons or plants to balance the fire element.
Ensure good lighting over food preparation areas.

baguaAreas.Wealth: The stove is a wealth symbol — keep all burners working.
baguaAreas.Health: Keep fresh herbs and healthy ingredients visible.
baguaAreas.Family: A family dining area near the kitchen strengthens bonds.

whatToAvoid: Avoid the stove being directly opposite the sink or fridge (fire vs. water).
Avoid broken appliances — they represent stagnant energy.
Avoid sharp knives visible from the dining area.

generalTips: Keep the toilet lid closed to prevent energy from draining away.
Fix any leaky faucets immediately — they waste wealth.
Use warm lighting to balance the water element.
Hang a mirror on the door to reflect energy back in.

baguaAreas.Wealth: Place a plant near the toilet to absorb and transform draining energy.
baguaAreas.Health: Use earth tones to balance the over-abundance of water.
baguaAreas.Career: A small mirror above the sink reflects career energy upward.

whatToAvoid: Avoid bathroom being the first room visible from the front door.
Avoid dark, damp corners — promote ventilation.
Avoid placing the bathroom in the wealth or fame bagua areas of your home.

generalTips: Keep the entryway bright, clean, and welcoming — it's where chi enters.
A mirror near the door doubles abundance that enters.
Place a small table or console with fresh flowers or a bowl of keys.
Use warm, inviting lighting to welcome good energy.

baguaAreas.Career: The front door feeds your career energy — keep it well-maintained.
baguaAreas.Wealth: A bowl of coins or crystals near the entrance attracts abundance.

whatToAvoid: Avoid clutter, shoes, or coats piled near the door.
Avoid a mirror directly facing the front door (it reflects chi back out).
Avoid dark, narrow entryways — use mirrors to expand the space.

generalTips: Position the CEO or manager desk in the 'command position' facing the door.
Arrange meeting tables in a circle or oval for equal energy flow.
Use natural light and live plants to energize the workspace.
Create a water feature in the wealth corner (southeast) of the office.
Keep communal areas clear and clutter-free for smooth chi circulation.

baguaAreas.Career: Place the main entrance or reception in the north area for career growth.
baguaAreas.Wealth: Position the finance department or accounting in the southeast.
baguaAreas.Fame: Place the CEO office or boardroom in the south for leadership energy.

whatToAvoid: Avoid cubicle layouts that block natural light and chi flow.
Avoid sharp corners or beams pointing at desks — use plants to soften.
Avoid the bathroom being in the center of the office (health & wealth drain).
Avoid dark, cramped hallways — use mirrors and lighting.

generalTips: Keep the entrance clear, bright, and welcoming — chi brings customers.
Arrange products to guide customers in a clockwise flow.
Place your best-selling items at eye level in the wealth area (southeast).
Use warm, inviting lighting in the entry and cool lighting in browsing areas.
Play soft, uplifting music to create positive energy vibrations.
Keep the cash register area clean and organized — it's your wealth center.

baguaAreas.Wealth: Position the cash register or checkout in the southeast corner.
baguaAreas.Fame: Feature your best products or promotions in the south area.
baguaAreas.Career: Keep the entrance open and welcoming in the north area.

whatToAvoid: Avoid cluttered entryways — customers won't enter if chi can't flow.
Avoid dark corners where energy stagnates — use mirrors and lights.
Avoid having the toilet facing the sales floor.
Avoid sharp corners or shelves pointing at aisles.

generalTips: Position the entrance to welcome chi — a clear, bright doorway invites diners.
Arrange tables so no diner faces a wall directly — give them a view of the room.
Place the kitchen in the south area for fire energy (fame & good food).
Use warm, rich colors on walls to stimulate appetite and conversation.
Fresh flowers on each table bring vibrant, living energy.
Keep the restroom area clean and well-scented — bad energy affects reviews.

baguaAreas.Fame: Feature your signature dishes or bar in the south area.
baguaAreas.Wealth: Position the cash register in the southeast corner.
baguaAreas.Health: Keep the kitchen organized and clean in the center area.

whatToAvoid: Avoid the restroom being near the entrance (drives away customers).
Avoid cramped seating — diners need personal space for good energy.
Avoid mirrors reflecting messy or unorganized areas.
Avoid broken or wobbly furniture — it signals instability.
